title: Always show panel tabs corrupts Options panel display
author: igor2x
body_snippet: On mRemoteNG 1.78.2 NB 3220: 1. File | Options | Tabs & Panels | check "Always show panel tabs". 2. Click on OK button to save and close down Options. 3. File | Options. Empty Options panel is displayed.

comments.author: igor2x
comments.snippet:
This issue still appears in mRemoteNG v1.78.2 NB 3224. Can you please reopen the issue.

BTW, I tried to accept the invitation, but it looks like I postponed it too much and invitation has expired.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: yes, thats ok, in curent stage I would not recomend to use NB in PROD - as its unstable a bit, I working on it every evening some time small parts are fixed, some times bigger issues apears due code is very paitfull and I am trying to reorganise it in proper manier but my personal target to make RC available before new year.
